message:
test(ftui-extras): improve mermaid_diff.rs test coverage (bd-50x22)

Add 24 edge-case tests covering: endpoint_node_id fallback paths,
node/edge label change detection, DiffStatus/DiffNode/DiffEdge
clone/copy traits, render_diff variants (offset area, legend
truncation, removed-only edges), dim_rect_interior skip spaces,
recolor_rect_border 3x3, is_empty per-counter, edge total count
consistency, and diff symmetry verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
